added.title: The People of the Deep
added.description: Iyanu, Biyi and Sewa face the Corrupt Divine Beast Ekun and the vicious People of the Deep. Meanwhile, in Elu, Workers' District citizens demand justice from Oba Adeyinka and Chancellor Nuro's oppressive regime.

added.title: The Source Part II
added.description: Iyanu reaches The Source and faces a devastating choice about her destiny. As Elu teeters on the brink of destruction from the Corrupt, Iyanu's allies fight a final battle against Chancellor Nuro and the Fallen One.

added.title: The Pink Painter Strikes Again
added.description: They're baaaaack! All 16 Campers from Season One return for more spills, thrills and dramaaaaa! And a very special guest arrives on the island to really mess things up. Hope everyone packed an extra pair of pants!

added.title: Taking it to the Rim Reaper
added.description: Things get wet, wild and gross when the Campers play waterslide basketball!

added.title: You Poor Saps
added.description: Tensions run high in this week's challenge when the Campers find themselves in a sticky situation.

added.title: Choosin' For a Bruisin'
added.description: Our campers get tested on how well they know each other. Correct answers could win them immunity, but incorrect answers drop them into a pool of hungry wolverines.

added.title: Ice to Beat You
added.description: A chilling challenge inside an iceberg leads to the coldest elimination of the season.

added.title: Canoe Believe It?
added.description: During a fun-filled day of canoe jousting, a special friendship is founded and an outed cheater gets pounded.

added.title: Fun Fight at the Oh Cake Corral
added.description: It's definitely no cake walk as Campers compete in the ultimate island bake-off. A very special guest judge even stops by for a bite!

added.title: Tortoise Rigamortis
added.description: With just 5 campers remaining things are getting tense. So today is just about having fun taking selfies with wild animals. Everyone had their rabies shot?

added.title: Caved by the Bell
added.description: The final 4 get must wander through a dark and spooky cave hunting for coins. The challenge only gets worse when they discover that something is also hunting them.

added.title: Magma Cum Laude
added.description: This is it! Today one of the 3 remaining campers will become a millionaire. The only thing standing in their way is 2 other campers, a forest, some lava, some violent goats, a mountain, and vomit. Other than that, pretty easy.

added.title: Fashion Bears
added.description: In order to abide by the clothing policy of their favorite Boba shop, the Bears get some new outfits. But with new looks come new lives including office work, fashion modeling and even falling in love!

added.title: The Island
added.description: While trying to sail to Japan, the Baby Bears get stranded on an island. Luckily, they meet Dave and Karla, who help with survival on the island while looking for an escape.

added.title: Bear Flu
added.description: The Bears become terribly ill and Chloe takes it upon herself to take care of them. But things get tricky when word of the Bears' sickness goes viral.

added.title: Chicken and Waffles
added.description: Panda needs to meet his brothers at the most exclusive restaurant in town. But when he loses his contacts lenses and can't see, Panda needs Charlie's help to get him into the city.

added.title: The Audition
added.description: The Bears audition to be the next mascot for their favorite cereal. They get so caught up in the process that their competitiveness gets the best of them.

added.title: Captain Craboo
added.description: The Bears are reunited with their pet crab, Captain Craboo. But after an unfortunate run-in with Nom Nom, the Bears may lose their pet forever.

added.title: Baby Bears on a Plane
added.description: The Baby Bears have an adventure in the sky while aboard a plane to Sweden. But when the baby Bears are forced to sit in different sections of the plan, things get a bit haywire for everyone on board.

added.title: Yuri and the Bear
added.description: Baby Ice Bear lives alone in the arctic and meets a mysterious man named Yuri. Together they help each other survive the cold environment.

added.title: Icy Nights
added.description: Ice Bear rides his custom vacuum into the city. But when a gang of techies steal the vacuum, Ice Bear goes on a rescue mission that takes him through the underground world of the city.

added.title: Everyone's Tube
added.description: Through a standard video browsing session online, we get a glimpse of the different kinds of videos the Bears have posted.

added.title: Betsy and Ghost Chapter 3: There's A Racket In My Hope Chest
added.description: The witches search for Betsy - who doesn't want to be found. Can she learn to love being a witch as much as she loves being a ghost?

added.title: Susie and her Sister Chapter 1: Heathers
added.description: Susie's new little sister has a gift for magic, but it's causing problems for the community. Will Susie learn to accept that Mildred is more powerful, and will the townsfolk be able to accept the most powerful witch in the world?

added.title: Susie and her Sister Chapter 2: Hot Corn Girls
added.description: On her 15th birthday, Susie must prepare for her Gibbous Rite Ceremony. Will Mildred be able to keep her chaotic magic in check for just one day so Susie can become the full witch woman of her dreams?

added.title: Susie and her Sister Chapter 3: Mildred's Friend
added.description: Locked in a standoff with Susie over who will say sorry first, Mildred runs away to the woods and befriends a ghost. Will one of the McAllister sisters give in and apologize before the townsfolk run Mildred out of town?

added.title: Oscar and the Monsters Chapter 1: Unaccompanied Oscar
added.description: When Oscar isn't invited to Alexa's birthday party, Mortimer tries to make him feel better by telling him about a similar time in his life. Ever the glowworm, Oscar sneaks back in time to help a young Mortimer overcome the sad experience.
